title: QR Codes: Connecting Global Real Time Payment Networks
excerpt: Discover how a simple, well-designed Payment QR Code can unlock faster, more efficient cross-border payments. This episode dives into the X9 Payment QR Code standard.
body:
Discover how a simple, well-designed Payment QR Code can unlock faster, more efficient cross-border payments. This episode dives into the X9 Payment QR Code standard—created in the U.S. to power instant payments and connect real-time payment networks around the world.

Don't miss this insightful conversation. Tune in to the latest episode of Real Time Payments Revolution here.
